{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description= To join the tournament, the Hammer Terminator changed its head to a hammer. It led to victory, but also to its eventual death...
|affct=TECH
|hard=DEF
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=3934
|relic1=Costa Rica Stone
|relic2=Galileo's Ball
|relic3=Archimedes' Lever
|relic4=Devol's Robot
|relic5=Mars Rover
}}
|color=green
|earth=1
|water=1
|fire=2
|wind=2
|form=Mecha
|element=Earth
|realm=Bharata
|orangehard=HP
}}
